title: Rename Rust CLI binary to tskr
description: Change the Rust CLI binary name from taskulus to tskr, and update any docs/tests that reference it.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

custom.beads_notes:
Starting work on renaming Rust CLI binary to tskr; will update cargo metadata, build outputs, docs, and tests.
Renamed Rust CLI binary to tskr: added Cargo [[bin]] entry, updated Rust CLI tests, release workflow asset names, install docs, and tooling defaults (benchmarks/build/verify).
Renamed Rust CLI to tskr, updated release artifacts, docs, and tooling defaults. Release run 21939141377 succeeded after change.
